content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Good Substrings". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/271/D
constraints: s consists of lowercase English letters
content.inputFormat: The first line contains a string s.
content.outputFormat: Print the number of good substrings of s.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed
